idea.title: War Table
idea.hook: Arrange your tiny army, send them into the clash, then recruit and upgrade to crush bigger and bigger hordes.
idea.hook_ru: Расставь маленькую армию, брось её в бой, нанимай и улучшай бойцов, чтобы крушить всё большие орды.
idea.prototype: A placement grid on YOUR half of a tabletop battlefield: drag units onto front/back-row slots (front-line tanks soak, back-line archers/mages deal ranged damage), tap FIGHT and both armies auto-march and clash with nearest-enemy targeting. Survivors win the round + loot gold. Between rounds recruit new unit TYPES, upgrade units, buy placement slots, reposition. Enemy armies escalate in size + composition with a miniboss every 5 waves. Lose when the enemy breaks through and drains your throne to 0 HP.
idea.mutation_of: Art of War Legions (tiny-army lane auto-battler) crossed with the danger_combat cover-CTR family (Age of Heroes / Space Arena PvP / Merge Mercs) and the strategy high-retention-ceiling target genre.
idea.why_novel: First lane auto-battler in the portfolio - distinct from our tower-defense (129 critter_siege) and survivor/legion (135 orb_legion) builds. The depth lever is positioning (front-vs-back) plus rock-paper-scissors unit counters (spearmen brace cavalry, cavalry flank archers, archers shred infantry, mages splash swarms, giants taunt, clerics heal), not reflex. Escalating, VARIED enemy comps + minibosses every 5 waves force the player to re-counter, giving a real in-run strategy arc rather than a same-clash-on-repeat toy.
idea.non_timer_pressure: Encroaching enemies that drain throne HP by POSITION (they reach you), plus scarcity of looted gold (never enough to recruit + upgrade + buy a slot at once). No countdown is the enemy.
idea.lose_condition: gs='GAMEOVER' when throneHp<=0 - enemies that survive the clash and reach the bottom throne zone drain THRONE_DRAIN_PER_SEC HP/s each; a badly out-countered wave punches through and bleeds the throne (starts at THRONE_HP_MAX=100) to 0 within ~40-60s of bad play.

ten_min_loop: Wave 1 ships a pre-placed starter squad (spearman + 2 archers); one tap on the glowing FIGHT button plays a satisfying clash within ~10s. Win -> loot gold -> recruit a new unit TYPE (knight/mage/giant/cleric) + upgrade existing types + buy extra placement slots -> reposition to counter the previewed next enemy comp -> clear boss waves. Escalation on BOTH density (enemy count + hp/atk scale every wave) AND new content on a schedule: wolf riders ~w2, orc brutes ~w3, skeleton archers ~w4, MINIBOSS Ogre Warlord w5, dark mage ~w6, shieldbearer ~w8, MINIBOSS Lich w10 (summons skeletons + AoE), MINIBOSS Warbeast w15 (fast charger + knockback). A new enemy type, player-unit unlock, or boss mutator is still entering at minute 8-10. Failure is forgiving: RETRY rebuilds the owned army at the same wave so the player is pulled straight back in; unlocked roster + bestWave persist.
non_timer_pressure: throne HP drained by enemy position (encroachment) + scarce looted gold spend decisions
synthesizer_brief: danger_combat is the #3 CTR cover archetype today (immediate conflict, weapon/enemy close to impact, high contrast, aggressive pose; refs Age of Heroes, Space Arena: PvP стратегия, Merge Mercs: Tower Defense TD, Westland Survival). Strategy is an explicit high retention-ceiling build-target family. The Art-of-War-Legions DNA (arrange a tiny army, watch it auto-clash, recruit/upgrade/reposition between rounds, face escalating armies with periodic minibosses) maps the aggressive-clash cover straight onto a deep, positioning+counters strategy core that retains. Build DEEP: >=5 player unit types with real rock-paper-scissors roles, >=6 enemy types + a miniboss every ~5 waves, escalating + varied comps, a real recruit/upgrade/reposition economy.

alternatives: Claw arcade tycoon (the sibling new build this run) - a claw-machine prize-grab tycoon loop.
Deep-sea salvage idle - dredge wrecks, upgrade the rig, idle accrual of salvage value.
Action-RPG dungeon descent - twin-stick room-by-room descent with loot + builds.
Roguelite deckbuilder - draft a combat deck, fight escalating encounters, relic synergies.
Deep tower-defense - multi-lane creep waves, tower trees, boss rushes (we have 129 critter_siege, so a fresh TD competes with an existing build).
